gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands tall and smiles, moving both arms wide open to welcome everyone to the lesson
a tutor leans slightly forward, tilts the head, and looks around the class to encourage students to share their experiences
a person uses hands to create a visual of seven groups, moving fingers to emphasize the number as they speak
a tutor gestures with both hands as if forming an array, stepping to the side slightly to demonstrate visually
a person enthusiastically claps hands together, encouraging students while moving closer to them for engagement
a tutor points to an imaginary array in front, moving one hand in a counting motion to guide students
a tutor raises both arms over head in celebration while smiling broadly, commending the class for their efforts
a person nods encouragingly, moving both hands in a forward gesture to motivate students about the importance of practice
